**[The predictive mind: An introduction to Bayesian Brain Theory].** — Encephale (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.encep.2021.09.011. PMID: 35012898. The question of how the mind works is at the heart of cognitive science. It aims to understand and explain the complex processes underlying perception, decision-making and learning, three fundamental areas of cognition. Bayesian Brain Theory, a computational approach derived from the principles of Predictive Processing (PP), offers a mechanistic and mathematical formulation of these cognitive processes.
